ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Mica: subtle texture from the desktop wallpaper, energy-efficient. Acrylic: stronger acrylic blur with tint. Tabbed: Mica variant for tabbed app windows. None: disables the effect entirely.
ast.target: 云母：来自桌面壁纸的微妙纹理，节能。亚克力：更强的亚克力模糊效果并带有色调。标签页式：适用于标签页应用窗口的云母变体。无：完全禁用该效果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opacity of the background in light mode (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque).
ast.target: 浅色模式下背景的不透明度（0 = 完全透明，1 = 完全不透明）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opacity of the background in dark mode (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque).
ast.target: 深色模式下背景的不透明度（0 = 完全透明，1 = 完全不透明）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses --background-secondary as the tint color. Disable to choose your own.
ast.target: 使用 --background-secondary 作为色调颜色。禁用以选择您自己的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base color of the tint overlay in light mode.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base color of the tint overlay in dark mode.
ast.target: 深色模式下色调叠加层的基色。

ast.source: Translucent BG: Windows only — plugin inactive on this platform.
